title: ATR-Spin: An open-source 3D printed device for direct cytocentrifugation onto Attenuated Total Reflectance crystals.
author: David Perez Guaita
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The 3d printed system presented integrates isolation, preconcentration, and measurement of the infrared spectra of cells from biofluids. The methodology allows cell separation and preconcentration, obtaining enhanced specific infrared spectra of cells
steps_raw: The 3d printed system presented integrates isolation, preconcentration, and measurement of the infrared spectra of cells from biofluids. The methodology allows cell separation and preconcentration, obtaining enhanced specific infrared spectra of cells
